figures.caption: Figure 3. The results show the conversion from sketches to component-editable 3D models.
Figure 2. Overview of the datasets, including the Japanese detached house dataset and the architectural component dataset.

Figure 4. Qualitative comparison of three pipelines: (1) Basic 3D Generation (no style adaptation), (2) Style-Enhanced 3D Generation (style adapter only), and (3) Ours (Full Pipeline) (style adapter with component replacement).

Figure 1. The overview of framework. Three-stage framework for component-level editing from sketches: sketch-to-image enhancement, 3D building model generation, and sketch-based retrieval and replacement.
